features.description: Consolidate open dependency and CI pull request changes into the master line
steps: Inspect open PR branches and determine the consolidated change set
Integrate selected dependency and workflow updates into the repo
Generate a backend lockfile and resolve install compatibility issues
Validate via npm ci, lint, tests, and smoke checks
Commit and push the consolidated branch

features.description: Analyze the DTS-1687 Linear duplicate status change for a MongoDB Atlas billing alert and prepare a resolution prompt for follow-up automation
steps: Review the Linear webhook payload and determine the latest issue status change
Research current MongoDB Atlas billing alert and billing optimization documentation
Identify the likely root cause for the status change and underlying alert
Create a prompt template for a Cursor agent to debug or resolve the event
Record MCP integration limitations and checkpoint the handoff artifact
